display.purpose: Home and page-hero titles, in the serif. Fluid clamp; text-wrap: balance.

headline.purpose: Major section openers, in the serif.

title.purpose: Program-card names and subsection headings, serif at 22px.

stat.purpose: Serif quantitative figures, category counts, oversized campus-initial watermark.

lede.purpose: Hero subheads and section intros, serif at reading weight.

body.purpose: Reading text and dense UI in the sans; hold prose to 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked section kickers, pill and chip text. One kicker per section, never stacked.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default card and panel definition at rest; the hairline border does most of the work.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Paired with translateY(-2px) on interactive cards and category tiles on hover/focus.

shadows.name: overlay-search
shadows.purpose: The floating hero search field on the dark hero.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for every state transition.

motion.name: dur-base
motion.purpose: Card hover lift, larger surface transitions.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: max-width below which layouts stack to one column (useIsMobile).

breakpoints.name: container-max
breakpoints.purpose: Maximum content width; centered with auto margins.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call to action: Find a program, Search. UC Blue, deepening on hover.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-emphasis ghost action. Blue Deep outline that inverts to a fill on hover.

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Rare high-emphasis or featured action. UC Gold with dark-blue text.

components.name: Industry Pill
components.description: Tint-mode classification tag for industries on cards. Accent color at low alpha; informs, does not act.

components.name: Type Chip
components.description: Program-type label printed over card art on near-opaque paper; the type color is the text color.

components.name: Compare Toggle
components.description: Signature add-to-compare control. Default ghost; inverts to a solid UC Blue Deep fill when on.

components.name: Program Card
components.description: The catalog's core record: campus-into-type gradient art with a serif name, clamped description, industry pills, and a compare toggle. Flat at rest, lifts 2px on hover.
components.html:
BEAccelerator UC Berkeley

Berkeley SkyDeck

The campus accelerator and global startup hub, with cohort funding and Berkeley's investor network.

HardwareAI / MLClimate
Rolling
components.css: .ds-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:340px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,32,51,.10);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,32,51,.05);transform:translateY(0);transition:box-shadow .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),transform .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}.ds-card:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(0,32,51,.12);transform:translateY(-2px)}.ds-card-art{position:relative;height:168px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#003262 0%,#005581 100%)}.ds-card-initials{position:absolute;right:-20px;bottom:-50px;font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;font-weight:600;font-size:200px;line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.15)}.ds-card-type{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#005581;background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px}.ds-card-campus{position:absolute;bottom:14px;left:14px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:#fff;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600}.ds-card-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;padding:20px 22px 22px}.ds-card-title{margin:0;font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;font-weight:600;font-size:22px;line-height:1.2;color:#002033}.ds-card-desc{margin:0;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;color:#4C4C4C}.ds-card-pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}.ds-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.02em;color:#005581;background:rgba(0,85,129,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,85,129,.20);border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;white-space:nowrap}.ds-card-foot{margin-top:6px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(0,32,51,.08);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px}.ds-card-meta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#4C4C4C}.ds-compare{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:'Source Sans 3',Arial,sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;color:#002033;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,32,51,.15);border-radius:4px;padding:6px 10px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s,color .15s}.ds-compare:hover{border-color:#005581}.ds-compare:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #005581;outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Hero Search Field
components.description: The home hero's floating search: paper block, leading icon, borderless input, UC Blue submit.

narrative.overview: This is the single front door to every entrepreneurship program across all ten University of California campuses: incubators, accelerators, courses, funding, competitions, and maker spaces, described in standardized fields so a stranger can compare them apples to apples. It carries the identity all ten campuses share, so it reads as an institutional public resource, not a startup's pitch. The metaphor is a printed field guide to a varied ecosystem: a serif voice for headlines and program names, official UC blue and gold as the spine, generous column measure, and a calm, navigable structure that helps someone find their way rather than impressing them. The palette is the official UC systemwide blue and gold, applied with discipline, over a paper-white surface warmed by the UC warm-gray neutral on grouped sections. Every other hue earns its place as data: the seven program-type colors and the ten campus navies are the legend of the guide, and the card artwork is that encoding made visible as a 135-degree gradient from campus navy into program-type hue. Because the audience is students, faculty, and partners making a real decision under time pressure, the discipline that overrides every aesthetic impulse is clarity: AA contrast as the enforced floor pushing toward AAA where the palette allows, a loud focus ring, real button and table semantics, color paired with text so it never carries meaning alone, and motion that disappears under prefers-reduced-motion.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial and institutional; a public field guide rather than a product pitch.
Official UC blue-and-gold as the spine; campus and program-type hues only as a data legend.
Paper-white with a warm off-white (#F7F5F1) for grouped surfaces; hairline borders, near-flat at rest.
Serif display voice (Source Serif 4) over humanist-sans body (Source Sans 3).
Comparison and accessibility are visible design features, not afterthoughts.

rules.name: The Blue-and-Gold Spine Rule
rules.body: UC Blue and UC Gold are the only colors permitted to carry identity. Every other hue must justify itself as data: which campus, which program type, which status. If a color is not distinguishing one thing from another, it does not belong on the page.

rules.name: The Campus-and-Type Legend Rule
rules.body: Categorical color comes only from two fixed sets: the ten official campus navies and the seven program-type hues. Do not invent new categorical colors. The card-art gradient is linear-gradient(135deg, <campus navy> 0%, <type hue> 100%), and that is the only place the two legends combine.

rules.name: The Contrast-First Rule
rules.body: Text and small-fill colors are chosen for WCAG AA on paper first, brand vibrancy second. Never use raw UC Blue (#1295D8), UC Gold (#FFB511), UC Orange (#FF6E1B), UC Pink (#E44C9A), or UC Light Blue (#72CDF4) as text or small-pill fills on white. Use UC Blue Deep (#005581) for blue text and the darkened status tokens for status.

rules.name: The Serif-for-Significance Rule
rules.body: Serif (Source Serif 4) carries headlines, program names, and figures; sans (Source Sans 3) carries everything you read in quantity and every UI control. Do not set body copy or button labels in the serif, or running prose in figures.

rules.name: The One-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked eyebrow is a section kicker, not wallpaper. At most one per section, naming what follows. Never stack two, and never let every block on a page open with one; let the serif headline carry sections that do not need a label.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Intent Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The 2px rise and drop shadow appear only as a response to hover or focus on something openable. If a static card is already casting a heavy shadow, the shadow is wrong. Borders define; shadows react.

dos: Do treat UC Blue (#1295D8) and UC Gold (#FFB511) as the identity spine and make every other hue earn its place as data: campus, program type, or status.
Do pull categorical color only from the ten campus navies and the seven program-type hues; combine them only in the 135deg card-art gradient.
Do pick text and small-fill colors for WCAG AA on paper first; use UC Blue Deep (#005581) for blue text and the darkened status tokens, never raw bright-brand hues, on white.
Do pair every categorical color with a text label or icon so meaning never rides on color alone; hold the AA floor that axe and pa11y enforce, and push toward AAA where the palette allows.
Do keep a loud global :focus-visible ring on every interactive element, and let real button and table semantics carry sort, disclosure, and compare state.
Do set headlines, program names, and figures in Source Serif 4 and reading text plus all UI in Source Sans 3; hold prose to roughly 65-75ch.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and lift them only on hover/focus; tint every shadow toward rgba(0,32,51,...).
Do warm grouped sections and page heroes with #F7F5F1, the brand's own warm gray, and keep cards on pure paper.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: disable smooth scroll, the hover lift, and transitions entirely.
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS landing: no gradient-on-dark hero cliche as a content substitute, no endless identical icon-heading-text feature-card grid, no big-number gradient hero-metric template.

Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text), glassmorphism, or decorative blur. The card-art gradient is a data encoding and the dark hero's glow is brand atmosphere; neither licenses gradient text.
Don't adopt a hypey startup voice: no marketing buzzwords (streamline, supercharge, empower, transform, seamless, world-class), no neon, no over-animation, no exclamation-point energy.
Don't let the utility surfaces collapse into a sterile all-gray admin dashboard. Density serves scanning, but UC blue-and-gold, the serif, and the warm surface stay present inside the tool.
Don't use side-stripe borders (a border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent). Use a full hairline border, a tint, a leading icon, or the type chip instead.
Don't nest a card inside a card, or use a card where a list row or inline group would read better.
Don't use UC Gold for text on white, or any color purely for vibrancy.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing; transitions ease out on background, color, and transform over 150-250ms.
Don't use em dashes in interface copy; use commas, colons, or parentheses.
